pr.title: Notable Non-Record: H-Net Tokenization — 0.6846 BPB — Hierarchical Token Processing

output.summary: H-Net learns gated merges and per-position unmerges to run a coarse encoder and full-resolution decoder for hierarchical tokenization.
techniques: Gated token merge/unmerge with per-position projections
Encoder runs at half resolution before full-resolution decoder
Sliding-window eval with int6 GPTQ calibration
